name: Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fish (such as cod, perch, etc., skin & bones removed, and cut into bite-sized pieces; frozen is acceptable)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, cook onions, green pepper, and parsley over very low heat for about 10 minutes.
2. Add garlic and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, white wine, oregano, basil, black pepper, and bay leaves.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 30-40 minutes.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaves.
6. Thaw shrimp under cold water if necessary.
7. Add fish (cut into bite-sized pieces) and shrimp.
8. Simmer covered for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
9. Enjoy!
